Review your Spiritual Gifts and their definitions. List any memories you have of those gifts being used or developed in your past.
AnswerDefault:
Example 1: My first memory of using my teaching gift was when I was in 4th grade. The neighborhood kids regularly came to my house and I often played the teacher in our make-believe school.

Example 2: I didn’t know it at the time, but I had a leadership gift in High School. I was the class president all 4 years and led the school to make multiple changes that are still in use today.
SummaryText: Here are the various times in your life that you identified seeing your gifts being active or developed.

Question: Review your Abilities. List any memories you have of those abilities being used or developed in your past.

Question: Review the People and the Causes you selected in the Passion section. Please share any life experiences you have had that potentially developed these passions in you. As a reminder, our greatest passions often emerge out of our greatest struggles.
AnswerDefault: Example: My passion for helping Young Marrieds develop strong financial plans developed in my middle age years. I was laid off from my job during the recession and did not have enough money to keep our house. I don’t want that to happen to anyone else.
SummaryText: Here are the various times in your life that you identified seeing your passions being developed in you.
